description: Diversified portfolio combining multiple uncorrelated strategies for consistent returns

strategies.name: volregime_target
strategies.description: Volatility regime targeting - adjusts position size based on market volatility
strategies.rationale: High trade count provides statistical significance. Adapts to market conditions.

strategies.name: breakout_atr_channel
strategies.description: ATR-based breakout detection for trend following
strategies.rationale: Highest trade count. Lower win rate but larger winners than losers.

strategies.name: meanrev_bollinger
strategies.description: Mean reversion using Bollinger Bands with RSI confirmation
strategies.rationale: Counter-trend strategy uncorrelated with breakout strategies.

strategies.name: volregime_adaptive
strategies.description: Adaptive volatility multiplier based on market regime
strategies.rationale: Lower drawdown. Can profit from both directions.

strategies.name: cash_reserve
strategies.rationale: Dry powder for opportunities or emergency withdrawal

entry_rules: Only enter when strategy signal aligns with portfolio risk budget
Wait for confirmation candle close before entry
exit_rules: Exit immediately on stop loss hit
Trail stop to breakeven after 50% of target reached
Close all positions if portfolio drawdown exceeds 15%
position_sizing: Reduce by 50% if portfolio already has >2 open positions
Skip trade if position size < minimum exchange lot

important_warnings: PAST PERFORMANCE DOES NOT GUARANTEE FUTURE RESULTS
Backtest results are optimistic - expect 30-50% worse in live trading
Start with paper trading for minimum 3 months
Never trade with money you cannot afford to lose
Market conditions change - strategies may stop working
Transaction costs and slippage will reduce returns
